hidden_state.wab_instruction: You previously confirmed "Wednesday, 10:00 AM" for the Q2 planning sync with {target.hana_name}, but that time may no longer be valid. Review the full thread "Q2 Planning Sync — Time Proposal" and any related emails from {target.hana_name}. If the confirmed time has been cancelled, find the replacement time she proposed and send a CORRECTION reply in the original thread with exact text: "Disregard my previous confirmation. The correct time is Thursday, 2:00 PM." Do NOT confirm Friday 4:00 PM (suggested by colleague {target.max_name} in an unrelated email, which conflicts with your recurring team standup mentioned in the "Weekly Standup — Standing Invite" thread).
